description: DataRef.embedded.content decodes to more than 65536 bytes. Registry MUST reject with embedded_too_large (HTTP 413). The cap is on the DECODED size, not the on-the-wire string length.

embedded.content: <a base64 string whose decoded byte length is 65537>
embedded._note: Concrete payload omitted; any base64 string decoding to ≥65537 bytes triggers this fixture.

decoding_rules_under_test.base64: decoded byte count after RFC 4648 decoding
decoding_rules_under_test.utf8: byte count after UTF-8 encoding the JSON string
decoding_rules_under_test.json: byte count of JCS canonical form
